Math4ML

This is my collection of notes on math for machine learning. Using KaTeX’s own font makes everything look much better.

Check that these equations blend well with the text:

Inline math: $E = mc^2$ stays inside the sentence.

\[\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} \,dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}\]

Another paragraph of text.
